title: The Manipur Land Revenue and Land Reforms Act, 1960
full_text: The Manipur Land Revenue and Land Reforms Act, 1960 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196033 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 1960-09-13 Act Year: 1960 Short Title: The Manipur Land Revenue and Land Reforms Act, 1960 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to land revenue in the Union territory of Manipur and to provide for certain measures of land reform. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 13-09-1960 Notification: By Administrator's Notification Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Manipur Land Revenue and Land Reforms Act, 1960 PART I CHAPTER I.—PRELIMINARY PART II CHAPTER II.REVENUE DIVISIONS, REVENUE OFFICERS AND THEIR APPOINTMENT CHAPTER III.—LAND AND LAND REVENUE CHAPTER IV.—SURVEY AND SETTLEMENT OF LAND REVENUE CHAPTER V.—LAND RECORDS CHAPTER VI.—BOUNDRARIES AND BOUNDARY MARKS CHAPTER VII.—REALISATION OF LAND REVENE AND OTHER PUBLIC DEMANDS CHAPTER VIII.—PROCEDURE OF REVENUE OFFICERS: APPEALS AND REVISIONS PART III CHAPTER IX.—RIGHTS OF LANDOWNERS CHAPTER X.—RIGHTS OF TENANTS PART IV CHAPTER XI.—CEILING ON LAND HOLDINGS CHAPTER XII.—PREVENTION OF FRAGMENTATION PART V CHAPTER XIII.—GENERAL AND MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Notification of appointments. Section 10. Seals. Section 11. Title of Government to lands, etc. Section 12. Right to trees, forests, etc. Section 13. Assignment of land for special purposes. Section 19. Assessment of land to land revenue. Section 20. Diversion of land. Section 21. Remission or suspension of revenue on failure of crops. Section 22. Section 33. Publication of table of revenue-rates. Section 34. Confirmation of the table of revenue-rates. Section 35. Rates of revenue to form part of settlement register. Section 36. Introduction of revenue-rates. Section 37. Duration of revenue-rates. Section 38. Assessment on holdings. Section 39. Additional assessment for water advantages. Section 40.
